visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on an older Asian man with short, graying hair, wearing a black collared shirt. He holds a silver flip phone to his right ear, his expression serious as he speaks. The background is a dimly lit, opulent room with a high, arched ceiling and a large, out-of-focus golden chandelier to the right. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains static, keeping the man as the central focus. A man speaks in a calm and slightly weary tone, as if concluding a conversation he's not particularly enthusiastic about. His voice is steady and direct as he says in Mandarin, "I won't say much, okay? To save you the trouble." The audio is clear, with no background music or other distracting sounds, focusing entirely on the man's voice. The scene cuts to a close-up of a younger Asian man with dark, spiky hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt. He is also on the phone, holding a silver flip phone to his ear. He looks down and to his left with a concerned and intense expression. The background is a brightly lit, out-of-focus interior space. The same white Chinese characters, "
